apigatewayv2.api.bodys3location.Bucket.Docs: The S3 bucket that contains the OpenAPI definition to import. Required if you specify a `BodyS3Location` for an API.

apigatewayv2.api.bodys3location.Etag.Docs: The Etag of the S3 object.

apigatewayv2.api.bodys3location.Key.Docs: The key of the S3 object. Required if you specify a `BodyS3Location` for an API.

apigatewayv2.api.bodys3location.Version.Docs: The version of the S3 object.
